nasb.text: Now in Joppa there was a disciple named Tabitha (which translated in Greek is called Dorcas); this woman was abounding with deeds of kindness and charity which she continually did.

esv.text: Now there was in Joppa a disciple named Tabitha, which, translated, means Dorcas. She was full of good works and acts of charity.

cnv.text: 在約帕有一個女門徒，名叫戴比莎，希臘話叫多加；她為人樂善好施。

ccb.text: 在约帕有个乐善好施的女信徒名叫戴碧达，希腊话叫多加，意思是“羚羊”。

csbs.text: 在约帕有一个女门徒，名叫塔比莎——“塔比莎”翻译出来意思是“羚羊”。她尽做美善工作，常行施舍。
